title: SMTP not working due to blocked port 587
symptom: Users are unable to send reset emails using SMTP settings configured with port 587, resulting in failure to send emails.
root_cause: Digital Ocean blocks port 587 to prevent spam, which prevents n8n from sending emails through SMTP when configured to use this port.
fix_steps: Change the SMTP port from 587 to 2525 in the .env file
Restart the n8n service to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Update the SMTP port to 2525 in the .env file and restart n8n.
